footer.foundingStatement: Scholarship, clinical practice, and natural therapeutics under one house
footer.closing: Knowledge before commerce. Service before profit. Trust before growth
footer.colophon: Sunnah Remedies · Est. MMXXV · Healing is from Allah · the remedy is a means

notFound.heading: THE CORRIDOR DOES NOT CONTINUE HERE
notFound.subheading: This page has not been found
notFound.body: You may have followed a link that has moved, or the page may have been withdrawn. The institution continues through the doors below

form.name: Name

form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address

dispensation.title: Dispensation
dispensation.intro: This remedy is dispensed from the cabinet and not presented as a retail commodity. The amount below covers preparation, packaging, and delivery, and is provided after the monograph so the evidence may be read first
dispensation.unavailable: This remedy is currently unavailable. Write to us to receive a return notice when stock is restored
dispensation.note: There is no need to decide immediately. Read the full monograph before requesting dispensation

monographExtras.evidenceIntro: Established evidence and emerging findings are listed separately. Neither replaces Prophetic grading or traditional scholarly standing

monograph.suggestedUseIntro: Offered as a traditional dietary means and not as treatment for a diagnosed medical condition

enrolmentForm.labelStatement: Application statement (prior study, motivation, understanding of limits)
enrolmentForm.acknowledgeText: I confirm that I have read the entry requirements, assessment standards, and policies for {programme}. I understand that acceptance is not guaranteed
enrolmentForm.note: Submission records your interest. Admission is determined after academic and clinical review
enrolmentForm.successMessage: Your application has been received. Faculty review is completed within fourteen days, and you will be contacted by email

errors.name: Full name is required
errors.email: Enter a valid email address, for example name@example.com
errors.qualification: State your healthcare qualification or prerequisite pathway

programmeView.editorialCaption: Clinical practice — sterile technique, patient care, and supervised assessment
programmeView.outcomesIntro: Assessed outcomes are published before enrolment and reviewed prior to examination
programmeView.testimonialsNote: Published with explicit consent. Initials are used unless full attribution is requested by the graduate. Statements are attestation records, not promotional copy
programmeView.enrolmentIntro: Review the full programme before submission. Each application is evaluated on academic readiness and clinical suitability

view.registrationIntro: This is not a booking. Each registration is reviewed through reading, interview, and suitability checks where applicable before placement is confirmed.

registrationForm.labelExperience: Prior study and relevant experience (foundations, travel, retreats)
registrationForm.acknowledgeText: I confirm that I have read the full journey page for {programme}, including safety guidance, logistics, packing, and policies
registrationForm.note: Register your interest; this is not a booking confirmation. Placement is offered after review and interview
registrationForm.successMessage: Your interest has been registered. The institution will contact you within fourteen days regarding reading review and interview

errors.name: Full name is required
errors.email: Enter a valid email address, for example name@example.com
errors.programme: Select a journey, or choose undecided
errors.experience: Describe your prior study and relevant travel experience

hero.title: Book Your Hijama Session

success.title: Thank you
success.message: Your booking request has been received. We will confirm your appointment shortly via email

patientForm.title: Patient Information
patientForm.consentText: I understand Hijama may not be suitable for everyone and agree to the consultation process

metadata.defaultTitle: Sunnah Remedies — Institute of Prophetic Medicine
metadata.defaultDescription: The world’s leading institute of Prophetic Medicine — scholarship, clinical care, and natural therapeutics under one house

threshold.standing: The world’s leading institute of Prophetic Medicine
threshold.declaration: A house for scholarship, clinical practice, and natural therapeutics across four departments. Built for careful study, patient service, and long stewardship

hospitable.heading: The house is preparing
